msg_restart_required: Language has been changed. You need to restart the application to apply changes.
msg_select_one: Please select at least one option!
home_footer: Optimize and speed up your system with Twiez Optimizer!
tips: Manage startup programs to improve performance.
Monitor hardware data to prevent failures.
Keep Windows Defender up to date.
Don't forget to create system restore points.
Clean prefetch files once a month.
Keep your system drivers up to date.
Adjust power plan according to your usage.
Monitor system resources to detect bottlenecks.
Clean memory dumps and crash reports.
chk_performance_desc: Optimizes your system for maximum performance. May increase battery consumption.
chk_cortana_desc: Disables Cortana assistant to free up system resources.
chk_print_desc: Disables background print spooler service to free resources.
chk_throttling_desc: Removes Windows network bandwidth throttling to improve internet speed.
chk_gamedvr_desc: Disables game recording feature to improve performance.
chk_hpet_desc: Disables High Precision Event Timer to improve performance.
chk_hello_desc: Disables facial recognition and fingerprint features.
chk_temp_desc: Temporary files are deleted, usually junk files.
chk_recycle_bin_desc: Files in the recycle bin are permanently deleted.
chk_prefetch_desc: Prefetch files are empty files that can be deleted to speed up the PC.
chk_browsers_desc: Browser cache is deleted, speeding up your browser. However, browser sessions may be closed!
chk_memory_dumps_desc: Cleans memory dumps and error reports created during system crashes.
chk_dns_cache_desc: Flushes DNS cache to refresh network connections.
opt_timeouts_desc: Reduces service shutdown time to improve system performance.
opt_remote_reg_desc: Closes remote registry access to improve security.
opt_show_hidden_desc: Shows file extensions and hidden files for better file management.
opt_disable_services_desc: Closes unnecessary background services to free up system resources.
opt_gpu_priority_desc: Optimizes GPU and processor priorities to improve performance.
opt_frame_server_desc: Disables frame server mode to improve performance.
opt_low_latency_desc: Sets GPU to low latency mode to improve gaming performance.
opt_limit_bg_desc: Limits resource usage of background processes to improve performance.
opt_sysmain_desc: Closes SysMain service to free up system resources.
opt_ntfs_timestamp_desc: Closes NTFS timestamp recording to improve disk performance.
perf_cpu_prio_desc: Optimizes CPU priorities for foreground applications.
perf_visual_desc: Disables Windows visual effects for maximum performance.
perf_bg_apps_desc: Prevents background apps from running to save resources.
perf_indexing_desc: Disables search indexing to reduce disk usage.
perf_hibernation_desc: Disables hibernation to free up disk space.
perf_telemetry_desc: Disables Windows data collection to improve privacy and performance.
perf_xbox_desc: Disables Xbox services if you don't play Xbox games.
info_desc: Twiez Optimizer is a professional system optimization tool.
clean_warn_select: Please select at least one option!
start_confirm_msg: Do you want to remove {} from startup?
sec_uac_restart: Restart computer for changes to take effect!
sec_congrats: Congratulations, you have no basic security vulnerabilities!
clean_sel_warn: Please select at least one option!
info_about_desc:
Twiez Optimizer is a comprehensive optimization tool developed for Windows systems. With this application, you can speed up your system, optimize your network, and clean up unnecessary files.

The application is developed using Python and PyQt5. You can easily optimize your system with its modern and user-friendly interface. Features include:

• System cleaning and optimization
• Windows Debloater and Telemetry Disabler
• Network and DNS Optimization (Fast DNS and Connection Repair)
• Startup program management
• Windows settings optimization
• Automatic System Restore Point

All these features are gathered in a single interface, ensuring your system runs at peak performance and safely.
debloat_bloatware_desc: Removes unnecessary built-in apps like Candy Crush, Xbox Game Bar, 3D Builder, Get Help, and Cortana.
debloat_telemetry_desc: Disables diagnostic data tracking and background telemetry services.
msg_restore_creating: Creating system restore point. This may take a moment...
msg_restore_success: Restore point created successfully. Proceeding with debloat...
msg_restore_failed:
Failed to create restore point. Do you want to proceed anyway?
Error: {}
msg_restore_disabled: System Restore is disabled on this PC. Do you want to proceed without a restore point?
net_dns_desc: Select a DNS server to improve your internet speed and privacy.
net_flush_desc: Clears network cache. Fixes websites not loading or connection errors.
net_winsock_desc: Resets network adapters to factory defaults. Requires restart.
msg_net_dns_success: DNS settings successfully changed on interface '{}'!
msg_net_winsock_success: Network reset successfully. Please restart your computer for changes to take effect!
home_announcements_text:
🎉 v1.3.0 The Ultimate Update!

• 🧽 Debloater: Remove pre-installed Microsoft bloatware and disable background telemetry tracking with a single click.
• 🌐 Network Optimizer: Switch to fast DNS servers like Cloudflare or Google to lower your ping.
• 🌍 Full Language Support: 100% English and Turkish support added. Language changes apply instantly without crashes.
• 💾 Smart Persistence: All your toggles and settings are now saved automatically when you close the app.
• 🛡️ Safe Execution: The app now automatically creates a 'System Restore Point' before applying deep system changes.
• ✨ UI Enhancements: Sleeker info tooltips, elegant notification pop-ups, and polished button designs.
